project.title: human liver cancer Phosphoproteomics
project.projectDescription: Effect of Aminopeptidase N on Hepatocellular Carcinoma
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: SDT lysis buffer was added to the sample. The lysate was sonicated and then boiled for 15 min. After centrifuged at 14000g for 40 min, the supernatant was quantified with the BCA Protein Assay Kit (Beyotime Biotechnology, Shanghai, China). The sample was stored at -80 °C.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: MS/MS spectra were searched using MASCOT engine embedded into Proteome Discoverer 2.1. Bioinformatics analysis of GO and KEGG.
